issues.description: Action type is 'PlayFromHand' but card text says 'from your trash' — should be 'PlayFromTrash' or equivalent zone-specific action
Missing 'rested' state in action — card text specifies the Character should be played 'rested', but DSL does not apply Rest effect
Missing 'up to 1' quantifier — DSL should include maxCount:1 to enforce 'up to 1' limit
